title: gymnogramma rupestris
intro: Gymnogramma rupestris, also known as the rock fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Gymnogramma rupestris can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although its preparation and dosage should be carefully considered and monitored.
